# awesome-ai-api (full dump for LLMs)

> Full, machine-readable leaderboard of AI API gateways, formatted for LLM ingestion.
> Snapshot: 2026-05-31 14:17 SGT. Total: 203. API-confirmed: 100.
> Canonical site: https://mackding.github.io/awesome-ai-api/
> Source repo: https://github.com/MackDing/awesome-ai-api
> License: MIT (code) + CC0 (data)

## Top 50 Gateways (sorted by score)

1. PackyAPI (PackyCode) — https://www.packyapi.com — score 9.9, API verified, region cn, engine unknown, latency 164ms, uptime 96.7% over 29 samples, models: claude, gpt, gemini, openai
2. AIHubMix — https://aihubmix.com — score 9.9, API verified, region global, engine openrouter, latency 456ms, uptime 96.7% over 29 samples, models: claude, gpt, gemini, chatgpt, openai, deepseek
3. Featherless — https://featherless.ai — score 9.8, API verified, region global, engine one-api, latency 143ms, uptime 96.7% over 29 samples, models: gpt, openai, deepseek, qwen, mistral, llama
4. Avian — https://avian.io — score 9.8, API verified, region global, engine unknown, latency 162ms, uptime 96.7% over 29 samples, models: claude, gpt, anthropic, openai, deepseek, llama
5. apipro.maynor1024.live — https://apipro.maynor1024.live — score 9.8, API verified, region cn, engine unknown, latency 203ms, uptime 96.7% over 29 samples, models: claude, gpt, gemini, openai, grok
6. api.vveai.com — https://api.vveai.com — score 9.8, API verified, region cn, engine unknown, latency 218ms, uptime 96.7% over 29 samples, models: claude, gpt, gemini, chatgpt, openai, deepseek
